name: com.deucarian.template.game.idle-auto-defense
displayName: Deucarian Template Game - Idle Auto Defense
description: Starter Unity game template for an idle auto-defense loop built on the Deucarian Auto Defense Suite.

samples.description: A ready-to-open starter scene with a central objective, visible perimeter spawns, direct and projectile weapon mounts, upgrades, save reset helpers, offline rewards, and placeholder primitives.
